purpose: Implement the Memory Atlas v1.2 S03 P2 credential-is-not-memory gate without blocking ordinary transcript backup.

boundary_rule.false_positive_guard: The scanner requires concrete credential-like assignments, token prefixes or private-key blocks. Plain discussion of token budgets, API-key policy or password-manager concepts must not be blocked.

failure_behavior.credential_pattern_found: fail gate before commit or public backup
failure_behavior.ordinary_transcript_without_credentials: allow through later raw append-only flow
